query: exact speed of light metres per second NIST BIPM
answer: The exact speed of light in a vacuum is 299,792,458 meters per second, as defined by the redefinition of the meter in 1983. This precise value is used to define the meter, ensuring consistency in measurements.

results.snippet: Conversion number between speed of light [c] and metre per second [m/s] is 299792458. This means, that speed of light is bigger unit than metre per second.
